name: Cream Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a pot over medium heat.
2. Gradually add the flour and blend well with the butter.
3. Slowly add the milk, stirring continuously until the mixture thickens.
4. Pour the mixture into a food processor and add half of the frozen corn.
5. Puree the contents and return them to the pot.
6. Add the remaining frozen corn and heat until the corn is hot.
7. If the mixture is too thick, adjust by adding milk as needed.
